prose:
Method–provenance summary
Property: HOMO–LUMO (frontier-orbital) gap, eV
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting) in PySCF 2023.9
Geometry provenance: single-point on user-supplied formaldehyde structure (path: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz); geometry not re-optimized at DFT (notation: DFT//input xyz)
Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent)
Charge = 0, multiplicity = 1 (closed-shell, RKS)
SCF convergence: converged in 8 cycles; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true; no warnings reported.
Live engine log was streamed to frontier_<timestamp>.out in the working directory while the job ran; result JSON written to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp31wx3f77/live.json.

Result
Frontier-orbital gap (εLUMO – εHOMO) = 5.869671192772918 eV
HOMO energy = −7.6523067 eV; LUMO energy = −1.7826355 eV

This value was obtained with the chemkit “frontier-orbitals” skill using PySCF DFT at the specified B3LYP/def2-TZVP level in the gas phase.

No engine warnings were reported.

Engine integrity verdict: trustworthy
